response.justification: Although Bogdan is a highly experienced software craftsman with a strong background in modern web and full-stack technologies, he does not meet the core requirements for this role. The position mandates 5-10 years of hands-on C++ development on Windows and deep expertise in Capital Markets or Fixed Income, whereas Bogdan's experience is heavily focused on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with only brief professional exposure to C/C++ nearly a decade ago.
strengths: Extensive overall software engineering experience (15+ years) across various stacks and architectures.
Solid understanding of CI/CD pipelines, DevOps, and software testing methodologies.
Some exposure to the financial sector through previous work at an investment platform (RIDE Capital).
concerns: Falls drastically short of the mandatory 5-10 years of C++ development experience.
Lacks exposure to Windows-based C++ development and enterprise SQL databases like SQL Server or Oracle.
No demonstrated expertise in Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking domains.
